The massive, highly lucrative world of corporate telecommunications was aggressively shifting toward the deployment of highly advanced, broadband infrastructure. ## SECTION 8 — This Day in History (World)
On September 4, 1998, an incredibly massive, fundamentally historic, and utterly world-altering corporate entity was officially and aggressively founded. Their incredibly massive, highly innovative PageRank algorithm absolutely and fiercely revolutionized internet search, completely destroying existing search engines and fundamentally launching the most massive, lucrative, and heavily dominant digital technology monopoly in modern human history.

On September 4, 1957, the incredibly massive, incredibly fierce, and highly courageous battle for civil rights aggressively erupted in Arkansas. ## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On September 4, 1825, Dadabhai Naoroji, the incredibly massive, universally revered "Grand Old Man of India," was officially and aggressively born in Bombay (Mumbai). A towering, brilliant intellectual, he achieved absolute historical immortality by heavily formulating the massive "Wealth Drain Theory," aggressively and mathematically proving that British colonial rule was systematically plundering the massive wealth of the subcontinent. His massive, foundational political work fiercely established the absolute ideological bedrock of the early Indian independence movement.

On September 4, 1946, incredibly massive, horrific, and absolutely devastating communal riots violently erupted across Bombay (Mumbai). As the massive political negotiations for the partition of India heavily deteriorated, fierce, aggressive clashes between Hindu and Muslim communities utterly paralyzed the massive commercial capital. The horrific, massive bloodshed resulted in hundreds of tragic deaths, heavily foreshadowing the absolute, unprecedented, and massive continental slaughter that would aggressively accompany independence the following year.
